message:
feat(cli): Wire up fcp policy subcommand

Add the fcp policy command to the CLI for policy simulation and
preflight checks:

- Add policy module to CLI crate imports
- Add Policy variant to Commands enum with PolicyArgs
- Document as "Policy simulation and preflight checks"
- Route to policy::run() in main dispatch
- Reject --input-stdin (not supported for this command)

The policy command allows operators to simulate policy outcomes for
InvokeRequests without side effects, useful for:
- Pre-deployment policy validation
- Debugging approval workflows
- Testing policy changes in isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
